prompt: A photorealistic K-pop album teaser poster featuring a young Asian woman with long messy black hair. She has pale skin, a beauty mark under her left eye, and looks off-camera with an intense expression. She wears a black sleeveless top and a black leather arm strap with silver buckles and a silver chain necklace against a plain white studio backdrop with cool lighting. The image includes elegant typography overlays. Top left text reads "1ST MINI ALBUM", "2024.05.17 6PM (KST)", and "마침내, 우리가 빛나는 순간". The middle left edge has "BURSTING INTO FLAME" rotated ninety degrees. Bottom left contains small copyright text. The lower right features large white Korean serif text "숨겨진 빛을 따라서" and "FOLLOW THE HIDDEN LIGHT". At the bottom right is the word "HELIOS" in a stylized serif font with a starburst in the O.
